title: polypodium lungtauense
intro: Polypodium lungtauense, also known as the Lungtau polypody, is a type of fern species native to Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Polypodium lungtauense include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In traditional medicine, Polypodium lungtauense is often used to make herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
